moments.title: Love Island UK still heating up
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, hosted by Maya Jama, launched on June 1st and continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, with a World Cup crossover theme this summer.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Still hooked on Love Island? The drama's been non-stop since June 1st, and with the World Cup crossover, it's a summer of goals and grafting! #LoveIslandUK

angles.name: Maya Jama's Return
angles.copy: Maya Jama is back in Mallorca, overseeing all the recouplings and 'I've got a text!' moments. Who's your favourite islander so far?

moments.title: Wimbledon serves up next week
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 begin next Monday, June 29th, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 kicks off next Monday, June 29th. Who are you backing for the singles titles?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: The grass courts of Wimbledon await! All eyes on London from June 29th for two weeks of tennis action. Can a Brit go all the way?

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival just wrapped
moments.blurb: The Isle of Wight Festival concluded on Sunday, June 21st, after a weekend of music featuring headliners Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris, and The Cure.

angles.name: Post-Festival Buzz
angles.copy: What a weekend on the island! The Isle of Wight Festival just wrapped up on Sunday. Who was your highlight from Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris, or The Cure?

angles.name: Memories
angles.copy: Still buzzing from the Isle of Wight Festival? We loved seeing Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris & The Cure light up the main stage. What were your favourite moments?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival brings Glasgow Green to life
moments.blurb: TRNSMT Festival 2026 in Glasgow Green finished on Sunday, June 21st, with headliners including Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Glasgow Vibes
angles.copy: Glasgow Green was absolutely electric this past weekend! TRNSMT Festival brought the noise with Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi. Who did you catch?

angles.name: Festival Recap
angles.copy: Another TRNSMT Festival for the books! If you were there, what was your favourite set from the weekend? Lewis Capaldi, Kasabian, or someone else?

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper turned 73
moments.blurb: Iconic pop singer Cyndi Lauper, known for hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'Time After Time', celebrated her 73rd birthday yesterday, June 22nd.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: A very happy belated 73rd birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper, who celebrated yesterday! What's your favourite track from the 'Queen of Quirky Pop'?

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: She's so unusual! Cyndi Lauper turned 73 yesterday. From 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' to 'True Colors', her music is timeless.

moments.title: Remembering George Michael
moments.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter George Michael, who passed away in 2016, would have celebrated his 63rd birthday this Thursday, June 25th.

angles.name: Tribute to a Legend
angles.copy: This Thursday, June 25th, would have been George Michael's 63rd birthday. A true icon whose music continues to touch millions. What's your favourite song by him?

angles.name: Wham! Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible George Michael, who would have been 63 this Thursday. From Wham! to his solo career, his impact on music is undeniable.

moments.title: Ariana Grande turns 33
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Ariana Grande, known for her powerful vocals and chart-topping hits, will celebrate her 33rd birthday this Friday, June 26th.

angles.name: Pop Princess Birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Ariana Grande turns 33 this Friday, June 26th. What's your all-time favourite track from the pop sensation?

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: From Nickelodeon to global charts, Ariana Grande celebrates her 33rd birthday on Friday! Send her some birthday love and tell us your top Ari song.

moments.title: Lionel Richie's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Soul and R&B legend Lionel Richie, famous for hits like 'Hello' and 'All Night Long', celebrated his 77th birthday on Sunday, June 20th.

angles.name: Birthday Rewind
angles.copy: Still celebrating the icon! Lionel Richie turned 77 on Sunday. What's your go-to Lionel track for those 'Easy Like Sunday Morning' vibes?

angles.name: Timeless Tunes
angles.copy: Happy belated 77th birthday to the incredible Lionel Richie! His music has brought joy for decades. What's your favourite Commodores or solo hit?

moments.title: Clarkson's Farm Season 5 concludes
moments.blurb: The final episodes of Clarkson's Farm Season 5 dropped on Prime Video on June 17th, wrapping up another eventful season at Diddly Squat Farm.

angles.name: Farm Life Fix
angles.copy: Have you caught up on the final episodes of Clarkson's Farm Season 5? We're already missing the chaos at Diddly Squat!

angles.name: Kaleb's Adventures
angles.copy: Clarkson's Farm Season 5 is officially done! What was your favourite moment from Jeremy, Kaleb and the team this series?

moments.title: The Agency Season 2 now streaming
moments.blurb: The second season of the political thriller 'The Agency' premiered on Paramount+ on June 21st, continuing the high-stakes espionage drama.

angles.name: New Thriller
angles.copy: Looking for a new binge? The Agency Season 2 just dropped on Paramount+ this past Sunday. Get ready for more spies and suspense!

angles.name: Espionage Drama
angles.copy: The Agency is back! Season 2 premiered on Paramount+ on June 21st. Have you started watching the latest twists and turns?

moments.title: Beyond Paradise Season 4 on BritBox
moments.blurb: The fourth season of the popular detective series 'Beyond Paradise', set in the Devonshire town of Shipton Abbott, premiered on BritBox on May 19th.

angles.name: Devon Detective
angles.copy: Our favourite Devon detective is back! Beyond Paradise Season 4 is now streaming on BritBox. Who's loving the latest Shipton Abbott mysteries?

angles.name: Westcountry Wonders
angles.copy: More stunning Westcountry scenery and baffling cases! Beyond Paradise Season 4 is on BritBox. Perfect for a dose of regional charm and mystery.

moments.title: Father Brown Season 13 arriving
moments.blurb: The 13th season of the beloved detective series 'Father Brown' is set to premiere on BritBox on June 30th, with the surprise return of Mrs. McCarthy.

angles.name: Cozy Mystery
angles.copy: Get ready for more clerical detecting! Father Brown Season 13 arrives on BritBox on June 30th. Who's excited for the return of Mrs. McCarthy?

angles.name: New Season
angles.copy: Father Brown is back! The new season drops June 30th on BritBox. Perfect for fans of classic British mysteries.

moments.title: Darcey Bussell explores Wild Coasts of Scotland
moments.blurb: Darcey Bussell's new series 'Wild Coasts of Scotland' premiered on BritBox on June 18th, showcasing the stunning Scottish coastline.

angles.name: Scottish Scenery
angles.copy: Dame Darcey Bussell is exploring the 'Wild Coasts of Scotland' in her new BritBox series, which premiered last week. Have you tuned in for the breathtaking views?

angles.name: Travel & Culture
angles.copy: Dreaming of a Scottish escape? Darcey Bussell's 'Wild Coasts of Scotland' is a new must-watch on BritBox, featuring incredible landscapes.

moments.title: Summer heat continues across UK
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing sunny and warm conditions for the start of summer, with temperatures expected to remain high in many areas over the next few days.

angles.name: Sunshine Vibes
angles.copy: Hello, summer! The sunshine is out across much of the UK today. How are you making the most of the warm weather?

angles.name: Heatwave Watch
angles.copy: Another beautiful day for many! Temperatures are staying warm across the UK. Remember to stay hydrated and enjoy the sunshine!

moments.title: Lexus Eastbourne Open ongoing
moments.blurb: The Lexus Eastbourne International tennis tournament, a key warm-up for Wimbledon, is currently underway, running from June 20th to 27th.

angles.name: Tennis Action
angles.copy: It's all happening on the grass courts! The Lexus Eastbourne International is in full swing, leading up to Wimbledon. Who are you watching?

angles.name: Road to Wimbledon
angles.copy: Catching the action from the Lexus Eastbourne International? It's a great chance to see the stars before Wimbledon kicks off next week!
